problem_owner_org.name: My Wall Panels
problem_owner_org.description: Wall panel retailer serving business customers through online and offline channels.

problem.title: Needs ecommerce operations that remove manual accounting and order-tracking workload
problem.description: My Wall Panels moved online but still faced manual accounting and customer-service friction. The case study says Magento lacked suitable accounting and product tracking, which left the business handling order-status questions by email and still relying on ledgers for returns and invoices.

requirements.body: Provide built-in order tracking and customer status communication to reduce manual email handling.

citations.source_title: How Zoho Commerce helped Mr Sajjan to migrate his entire business from Magento and why.
citations.evidence_note: Supports size band, the Magento limitations, the manual accounting burden, customer tracking emails, and staffing pressure.

requirements.body: Support accounting and invoicing workflows that reduce manual ledger work.

pilot_framework.scope: Pilot improved workflows across online order tracking, customer notifications, invoicing, and finance administration for the main ecommerce store.
pilot_framework.suggested_kpis: Track customer inquiries about order status, time spent on manual invoice handling, percentage of orders with automated tracking updates, and staff time saved in online order administration.
pilot_framework.success_criteria: The pilot succeeds if order updates are automated, manual finance work is reduced, and online operations can be managed without hiring additional staff to cover basic process gaps.
pilot_framework.common_pitfalls: Common pitfalls include leaving invoice exceptions outside the workflow, inconsistent product-status updates, and failing to connect customer communications to order records.
pilot_framework.duration: A 4- to 6-week pilot is appropriate for one ecommerce storefront and its associated finance and order-status workflows.
pilot_framework.resource_commitment: Requires an ecommerce owner, one finance or operations contact, and limited admin support to configure notifications, invoices, and order-status handling.
